mapper.sql: rt.id, rt.rule_id, rt.target_type, rt.target_id, rt.priority, rt.is_primary, coalesce(m.model_code, mp.pool_code) as target_code, coalesce(m.name, mp.name) as target_name, coalesce(m.model_type, mp.model_type) as model_type, m.provider_id
mapper.select: select from routing_rule_targets rt left join models m on rt.target_type = 'MODEL' and rt.target_id = m.id left join model_pools mp on rt.target_type = 'MODEL_POOL' and rt.target_id = mp.id where rt.rule_id = #{ruleId} order by rt.priority asc, rt.id asc
mapper.insert: insert into routing_rule_targets(rule_id, target_type, target_id, priority, is_primary) values(#{ruleId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{priority}, #{primary})
